name: 穿越女主×冷宮姐妹團（互助逆襲）
name_en: Transmigrated Heroine × Cold Palace Sisterhood (Mutual Aid Reversal)
description: 女主帶領冷宮中被遺棄的妃嬪們共同致富、互相扶持，展現女性團結的力量。這個組合打破了後宮劇中女性互鬥的套路，帶來正能量和治癒感。

examples.drama_title: Girl Transmigrated Unfavored Concubine,Unexpectedly Use Modern Knowledge Raise Baby,Emperor Shock!
examples.excerpt: We met when we were nothing. I will always be your Laura... Laura, because of you, we have today with you in the palace. Happy souls will only grow in number. Sunshine will bathe whole palace and you will be that light shining on every citizen of Calidori.
examples.context: 女主帶領冷宮中被遺棄的妃嬪們共同致富、互相扶持，展現女性團結的力量。這個組合打破了後宮劇中女性互鬥的套路，帶來正能量和治癒感。
